verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእየት ፡ ራሔል ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትወልድ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ቀንአት ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ልያ ፡ እኅታ ፡ ወትቤሎ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡
                  ሀበኒ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ ወእማእኮ ፡ እመውት ።

translations.lxx: And Rachel having perceived that she bore Jacob no children, was jealous of her sister; and said to Jacob, Give me children; and if not, I shall die.
translations.kjv: And when Rachel saw that she bare Jacob no children, Rachel envied her sister; and said unto Jacob, Give me children, or else I die.

verses.geez: ወተምዕዓ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለራሔል ፡ ወይቤላ ፡ ከመ ፡ እግዚአብሔርኑ ፡ እከውነኪ ፡ አነ ፡ ዘከልአኪ ፡ ፍሬ ፡ ከርሥኪ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob was angry with Rachel, and said to her, Am I in the place of God, who has deprived thee of the fruit of the womb?
translations.kjv: And Jacob’s anger was kindled against Rachel: and he said, Am I in God’s stead, who hath withheld from thee the fruit of the womb?

verses.geez:
ወትቤሎ ፡ ራሔል ፡ ነያ ፡ አመትየ ፡ ባላ ፡ ሑር ፡ ባእ ፡ ኀቤሃ ፡ ወትለድ ፡ ዲበ ፡ አብራኪየ ፡ ወእትወለድ ፡ አነሂ
                  ፡ እምኔሃ ።

translations.lxx: And Rachel said to Jacob, Behold my handmaid Balla, go in to her, and she shall bear upon my knees, and I also shall have children by her.
translations.kjv: And she said, Behold my maid Bilhah, go in unto her; and she shall bear upon my knees, that I may also have children by her.

verses.geez: ወወሀበቶ ፡ ባላሃ ፡ ትኩኖ ፡ ብእሲቶ ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ኀቤሃ ።

translations.lxx: And she gave him Balla her maid, for a wife to him; and Jacob went in to her.
translations.kjv: And she gave him Bilhah her handmaid to wife: and Jacob went in unto her.

verses.geez: ወፀንሰት ፡ ባላ ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ።

translations.lxx: And Balla, Rachel's maid, conceived, and bore Jacob a son.
translations.kjv: And Bilhah conceived, and bare Jacob a son.

verses.geez:
ወትቤ ፡ ራሔል ፡ ፈትሐ ፡ ሊተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወሰምዐኒ ፡ ቃልየ ፡ ወወሀበኒ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ወበእንተዝ ፡ ሰመየቶ ፡ ስሞ
                  ፡ ዳን ።

translations.lxx: And Rachel said, God has given judgment for me, and hearkened to my voice, and has given me a son; therefore she called his name, Dan.
translations.kjv: And Rachel said, God hath judged me, and hath also heard my voice, and hath given me a son: therefore called she his name Dan.

verses.geez: ወፀንሰት ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ባላ ፡ አመተ ፡ ራሔል ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ካልአ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ።

translations.lxx: And Balla, Rachel's maid, conceived yet again, and bore a second son to Jacob.
translations.kjv: And Bilhah Rachel’s maid conceived again, and bare Jacob a second son.

verses.geez: ወትቤ ፡ መጠቀኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወመሴልክዋ ፡ ለእኅትየ ፡ ወኀየልክዋ ፡ ወሰመየቶ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ንፍታሌም ።

translations.lxx: And Rachel said, God has helped me, and I contended with my sister and prevailed; and she called his name, Nephthalim.
translations.kjv: And Rachel said, With great wrestlings have I wrestled with my sister, and I have prevailed: and she called his name Naphtali.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእየት ፡ ልያ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢወለደት ፡ ወኀደገት ፡ ወሊደ ፡ ነሥአታ ፡ ለዘለፋ ፡ አመታ ፡ ወወሀበቶ ፡ ለያዕቆብ
                  ፡ ትኩኖ ፡ ብእሲተ ።

translations.lxx: And Lea saw that she ceased from bearing, and she took Zelpha her maid, and gave her to Jacob for a wife; and he went in to her.
translations.kjv: When Leah saw that she had left bearing, she took Zilpah her maid, and gave her Jacob to wife.

verses.geez: ወፀንሰት ፡ ዘለፋ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ።

translations.lxx: And Zelpha the maid of Lea conceived, and bore Jacob a son.
translations.kjv: And Zilpah Leah’s maid bare Jacob a son.

verses.geez: ወትቤ ፡ ልያ ፡ አብፃዕኩ ፡ አነኒ ፡ ወሰመየት ፡ ስሞ ፡ ጋድ ።

translations.lxx: And Lea said, It is happily: and she called his name, Gad.
translations.kjv: And Leah said, A troop cometh: and she called his name Gad.

verses.geez: ወፀንሰት ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ዘለፋ ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ለያዕቆብ ።

translations.lxx: And Zelpha the maid of Lea conceived yet again, and bore Jacob a second son.
translations.kjv: And Zilpah Leah’s maid bare Jacob a second son.

verses.geez: ወትቤ ፡ ልያ ፡ ብፅዕት ፡ አነ ፡ ወያስተበፅዓኒ ፡ አንስት ፡ ወሰመየት ፡ ስሞ ፡ አሴር ።

translations.lxx: And Lea said, I am blessed, for the women will pronounce me blessed; and she called his name, Aser.
translations.kjv: And Leah said, Happy am I, for the daughters will call me blessed: and she called his name Asher.

verses.geez:
ወሖረ ፡ ሩቤል ፡ በመዋዕለ ፡ ማእረረ ፡ ስርናይ ፡ ወረከበ ፡ ኮለ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ በገዳም ፡ ወአምጽአ ፡ ላቲ ፡ ለእሙ ፡
                  ወትቤላ ፡ ራሔል ፡ ለልያ ፡ ሀብኒ ፡ ኮለ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ ዘወልድኪ ።

translations.lxx: And Ruben went in the day of barley-harvest, and found apples of mandrakes in the field, and brought them to his mother Lea; and Rachel said to Lea her sister, Give me of thy son's mandrakes.
translations.kjv: And Reuben went in the days of wheat harvest, and found mandrakes in the field, and brought them unto his mother Leah. Then Rachel said to Leah, Give me, I pray thee, of thy son’s mandrakes.

verses.geez:
ወትቤ ፡ ልያ ፡ ኢአከለኪኑ ፡ ዘነሣእክኒ ፡ ምትየ ፡ ወዓዲ ፡ ትፈቅዲ ፡ ትንሥእኒ ፡ ኮለሂ ፡ ዘወልድየ ፡ ወትቤላ ፡
                  ራሔል ፡ ለልያ ፡ አኮ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ለይቢት ፡ ዮም ፡ ኀቤኪ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኮለ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ ዘወልድኪ ፡ (ወወሀበታ ።)

translations.lxx: And Lea said, Is it not enough for thee that thou hast taken my husband, wilt thou also take my son's mandrakes? And Rachel said, Not so: let him lie with thee to-night for thy son's mandrakes.
translations.kjv: And she said unto her, Is it a small matter that thou hast taken my husband? and wouldest thou take away my son’s mandrakes also? And Rachel said, Therefore he shall lie with thee to night for thy son’s mandrakes.

verses.geez:
ወአተወ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ እምሐቅል ፡ ፍና ፡ ሰርክ ፡ ወተቀበለቶ ፡ ልያ ፡ (ፍና ፡ ሰርክ ፡) ወትቤሎ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ትበይት ፡
                  ዮም ፡ እስመ ፡ ተሣየጥኩከ ፡ በኮለ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ ዘወልድየ ፡ ወቤተ ፡ ኀቤሃ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ሌሊት ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob came in out of the field at even; and Lea went forth to meet him, and said, Thou shalt come in to me this day, for I have hired thee for my son's mandrakes; and he lay with her that night.
translations.kjv: And Jacob came out of the field in the evening, and Leah went out to meet him, and said, Thou must come in unto me; for surely I have hired thee with my son’s mandrakes. And he lay with her that night.

verses.geez: ወሰምዓ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለልያ ፡ ወፀንሰት ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልዶ ፡ ኃምሰ ።

translations.lxx: And God hearkened to Lea, and she conceived, and bore Jacob a fifth son.
translations.kjv: And God hearkened unto Leah, and she conceived, and bare Jacob the fifth son.

verses.geez:
ወትቤ ፡ ልያ ፡ ወሀበኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዐስብየ ፡ እስመ ፡ ወሀብክዋ ፡ ኮለ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ ዘወልድየ ፡ ወሰመየቶ ፡ ስሞ
                  ፡ ይሳኮር ፡ ዐስብ ፡ ብሂል ።

translations.lxx: And Lea said, God has given me my reward, because I gave my maid to my husband; and she called his name Issachar, which is, Reward.
translations.kjv: And Leah said, God hath given me my hire, because I have given my maiden to my husband: and she called his name Issachar.

verses.geez: ወፀንሰት ፡ [ዓዲ ፡] ልያ ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ሳድሰ ።

translations.lxx: And Lea conceived again, and bore Jacob a sixth son.
translations.kjv: And Leah conceived again, and bare Jacob the sixth son.

verses.geez:
ወትቤ ፡ ልያ ፡ ፈትሐ ፡ ሊተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ፍትሐ ፡ ሠናየ ፡ እምዮምሰ ፡ እንከሰ ፡ ያፈቅረኒ ፡ ምትየ ፡ እስመ ፡
                  ወለድኩ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ስድስተ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ወሰመየት ፡ ስሞ ፡ ዛቡሎን ።

translations.lxx: And Lea said, God has given me a good gift in this time; my husband will choose me, for I have born him six sons: and she called his name, Zabulon.
translations.kjv: And Leah said, God hath endued me with a good dowry; now will my husband dwell with me, because I have born him six sons: and she called his name Zebulun.

verses.geez: ወእምዝ ፡ ወለደት ፡ ወለተ ፡ ወሰመየታ ፡ ዲና ።

translations.lxx: And after this she bore a daughter; and she called her name, Dina.
translations.kjv: And afterwards she bare a daughter, and called her name Dinah.

verses.geez: ወተዘከራ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለራሔል ፡ ወፈትሐ ፡ ማሕፀና ።

translations.lxx: And God remembered Rachel, and God hearkened to her, and he opened her womb.
translations.kjv: And God remembered Rachel, and God hearkened to her, and opened her womb.

verses.geez: ወፀንሰት ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ወትቤ ፡ አውፅአ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እምላዕሌየ ፡ ዝንጓጔየ ።

translations.lxx: And she conceived, and bore Jacob a son; and Rachel said, God has taken away my reproach.
translations.kjv: And she conceived, and bare a son; and said, God hath taken away my reproach:

verses.geez: ወሰመየቶ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ወትቤ ፡ ይዌስከኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወልደ ፡ ካልአ ።

translations.lxx: And she called his name Joseph, saying, Let God add to me another son.
translations.kjv: And she called his name Joseph; and said, The LORD shall add to me another son.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ወለደት ፡ ራሔል ፡ ዮሴፍሃ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለላባ ፡ ፈንወኒ ፡ ከመ ፡ እሑር ፡ ብሔርየ ፡ ወውስተ ፡
                  ምድርየ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when Rachel had born Joseph, Jacob said to Laban, Send me away, that I may go to my place and to my land.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when Rachel had born Joseph, that Jacob said unto Laban, Send me away, that I may go unto mine own place, and to my country.

verses.geez: ወሀበኒ ፡ ደቂቅየ ፡ ወአንስቲያየ ፡ ዘበእንቲአሆን ፡ ተቀነይኩ ፡ ለከ ፡ ለሊከ ፡ ታአምር ፡ ከመ ፡ ተቀነይኩ ፡ ለከ ።

translations.lxx: Restore my wives and my children, for whom I have served thee, that I may depart, for thou knowest the service wherewith I have served thee.
translations.kjv: Give me my wives and my children, for whom I have served thee, and let me go: for thou knowest my service which I have done thee.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ረከብኩ ፡ ሞገሰ ፡ በቅድሜከ ፡ እስመ ፡ አእመርኩ ፡ ከመ ፡ ባረከኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  በእንቲአከ ፤

translations.lxx: And Laban said to him, If I have found grace in thy sight, I would augur well, for the Lord has blessed me at thy coming in.
translations.kjv: And Laban said unto him, I pray thee, if I have found favour in thine eyes, tarry: for I have learned by experience that the LORD hath blessed me for thy sake.

verses.geez: ፍልጥ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ዐስበከ ፡ ዘእሁበከ ።

translations.lxx: Appoint me thy wages, and I will give them.
translations.kjv: And he said, Appoint me thy wages, and I will give it.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ዘከመ ፡ ተቀነይኩ ፡ ለከ ፡ ኢታአምርኑ ፡ ወሚመጠን ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ እንስሳከ ፡ ዘኀቤየ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said, Thou knowest in what things I have served thee, and how many cattle of thine are with me.
translations.kjv: And he said unto him, Thou knowest how I have served thee, and how thy cattle was with me.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ኅዳጥ ፡ ረከብክዎን ፡ ወመልኣ ፡ ወበዝኃ ፡ ወባረኮን ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በእግረ ፡ ዚአየ ፡ ወይእዘኒ ፡ ማእዜኑመ
                  ፡ እገብር ፡ አንሰ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ለርእስየ ።

translations.lxx: For it was little thou hadst before my time, and it is increased to a multitude, and the Lord God has blessed thee since my coming; now then, when shall I set up also my own house?
translations.kjv: For it was little which thou hadst before I came, and it is now increased unto a multitude; and the LORD hath blessed thee since my coming: and now when shall I provide for mine own house also?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ላባ ፡ ምንተ ፡ አሀብከ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ዘተሀበኒ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ገበርከ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ዘንተ ፡
                  ነገረ ፡ እርዒ ፡ ካዕበ ፡ አባግዒከ ፡ ወአዐቅብ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban said to him, What shall I give thee? and Jacob said to him, Thou shalt not give me anything; if thou wilt do this thing for me, I will again tend thy flocks and keep them.
translations.kjv: And he said, What shall I give thee? And Jacob said, Thou shalt not give me any thing: if thou wilt do this thing for me, I will again feed and keep thy flock.

verses.geez:
ወይኅልፍ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ አባግዒከ ፡ ዮም ፡ ወፍልጥ ፡ እምውስቴቱ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ በግዐ ፡ ዘጸዐዳ ፡ ጸጐሩ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡
                  ወዘኰሠኰሥ ፡ ሕብሩ ፡ ወፍጥረቱ ፡ ይኩነኒ ፡ ዐስብየ ።

translations.lxx: Let all thy sheep pass by to-day, and separate thence every grey sheep among the rams, and every one that is speckled and spotted among the goats—this shall be my reward.
translations.kjv: I will pass through all thy flock to day, removing from thence all the speckled and spotted cattle, and all the brown cattle among the sheep, and the spotted and speckled among the goats: and of such shall be my hire.

verses.geez: ወኵሉ ፡ ዘኢኮነ ፡ ኰሠኰሠ ፡ ወዘኢኮነ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ ፍጥረቱ ፡ ለከ ፡ ይኩን ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And my righteousness shall answer for me on the morrow, for it is my reward before thee: whatever shall not be spotted and speckled among the goats, and grey among the rams, shall be stolen with me.
translations.kjv: So shall my righteousness answer for me in time to come, when it shall come for my hire before thy face: every one that is not speckled and spotted among the goats, and brown among the sheep, that shall be counted stolen with me.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ላባ ፡ ይኩን ፡ በከመ ፡ ትቤ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban said to him, Let it be according to thy word.
translations.kjv: And Laban said, Behold, I would it might be according to thy word.

verses.geez:
ወፈለጠ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ አብሓኰ ፡ [አባግዕ ፡] ወዘኰሠኰሥ ፡ ወዘጸዐዳ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ አብሓኰ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ ወዘኰሠኰሥ
                  ፡ ወዘጸዐዳ ፡ ወዘቀዪሕ ፡ ሕብሩ ፡ ወወሀበ ፡ ለደቂቁ ።

translations.lxx: And he separated in that day the spotted and speckled he-goats, and all the spotted and speckled she-goats, and all that was grey among the rams, and every one that was white among them, and he gave them into the hand of his sons.
translations.kjv: And he removed that day the he goats that were ringstraked and spotted, and all the she goats that were speckled and spotted, and every one that had some white in it, and all the brown among the sheep, and gave them into the hand of his sons.

verses.geez: ወርሕቀ ፡ ምሕዋረ ፡ ሠሉስ ፡ ማእከሎሙ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወያዕቆብሰ ፡ ይሬዒ ፡ አባግዐ ፡ ላባ ፡ ዘተርፈ ።

translations.lxx: And he set a distance of a three days' journey between them and Jacob. And Jacob tended the cattle of Laban that were left behind.
translations.kjv: And he set three days’ journey betwixt himself and Jacob: and Jacob fed the rest of Laban’s flocks.

verses.geez:
ወነሥአ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ [ያዕቆብ ፡ በትረ ፡] ዘልብን ፡ ሐመልሚለ ፡ ወዘከርካዕ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ ወለሐጸ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወአሰሰሎ ፡
                  ኀመልሚሎ ፡ ወአስተርአየ ፡ ጻዕዳሆን ፡ ለእማንቱ ፡ አብትር ፡ እለ ፡ ለሐጸ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob took to himself green rods of storax tree and walnut and plane-tree; and Jacob peeled in them white stripes; and as he drew off the green, the white stripe which he had made appeared alternate on the rods.
translations.kjv: And Jacob took him rods of green poplar, and of the hazel and chestnut tree; and pilled white strakes in them, and made the white appear which was in the rods.

verses.geez:
ወወደዮን ፡ ለእማንቱ ፡ አብትር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገብላት ፡ ዘምስታየ ፡ ማይ ፡ ከመ ፡ ሶበ ፡ መጽአ ፡ እማንቱ ፡ አባግዕ ፡
                  ይስተያ ፡ ቅድሜሆን ፡ ይኩና ፡ እማንቱ ፡ አብትር ፡ ወሶበ ፡ መጽአ ፡ እማንቱ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ይስተያ ፡ ይፀንሳ ፡ በአርአያሆን
                  ፡ ለእማንቱ ፡ አብትር ።

translations.lxx: And he laid the rods which he had peeled, in the hollows of the watering-troughs, that whensoever the cattle should come to drink, as they should have come to drink before the rods, the cattle might conceive at the rods.
translations.kjv: And he set the rods which he had pilled before the flocks in the gutters in the watering troughs when the flocks came to drink, that they should conceive when they came to drink.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ መጽኣ ፡ ወሰትያ ፡ ፀንሳ ፡ በአርአያሆን ፡ ለእማንቱ ፡ አብትር ፡ ወወለዳ ፡ እማንቱ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡
                  ወዘሕብረ ፡ ሐመድ ፡ ወኰሠኰሠ ።

translations.lxx: So the cattle conceived at the rods, and the cattle brought forth young speckled, and streaked and spotted with ash-coloured spots.
translations.kjv: And the flocks conceived before the rods, and brought forth cattle ringstraked, speckled, and spotted.

verses.geez:
ወቢጸ ፡ ተባዕት ፡ አባግዒሁ ፡ ፈለጠ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወአቀሞን ፡ ቅድመ ፡ አብሓኵ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ ወዘሕብረ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ ወፈለጠ
                  ፡ መራዕየ ፡ እንተ ፡ ባሕቲቱ ፡ ወኢደመሮን ፡ ውስተ ፡ አባግዐ ፡ ላባ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob separated the lambs, and set before the sheep a speckled ram, and every variegated one among the lambs, and he separated flocks for himself alone, and did not mingle them with the sheep of Laban.
translations.kjv: And Jacob did separate the lambs, and set the faces of the flocks toward the ringstraked, and all the brown in the flock of Laban; and he put his own flocks by themselves, and put them not unto Laban’s cattle.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ እንከ ፡ አመ ፡ መዋዕሊሁ ፡ በዘ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ይፀንሳ ፡ እማንቱ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ይሠይሞን ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለእማንቱ ፡
                  አብትር ፡ ቅድመ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገብላት ፡ ከመ ፡ ይፅነሳ ፡ በአርአያሆን ፡ ለእማንቱ ፡ አብትር ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass in the time wherein the cattle became pregnant, conceiving in the belly, Jacob put the rods before the cattle in the troughs, that they might conceive by the rods.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, whensoever the stronger cattle did conceive, that Jacob laid the rods before the eyes of the cattle in the gutters, that they might conceive among the rods.

verses.geez:
ወእምከመ ፡ ወለዳ ፡ እማንቱ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ኢይሠይሞን ፡ እንከ ፡ ወኮና ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘቦቱ ፡ ትእምርተ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡
                  ወዘአልቦ ፡ ትእምርተ ፡ ለላባ ።

translations.lxx: But he did not put them in indiscriminately whenever the cattle happened to bring forth, but the unmarked ones were Laban's, and the marked ones Jacob's.
translations.kjv: But when the cattle were feeble, he put them not in: so the feebler were Laban’s, and the stronger Jacob’s.

verses.geez:
ወብዕለ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ፈድፋደ ፡ ወአጥረየ ፡ ብዙነ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ወአልህምተ ፡ ወአግብርተ ፡ ወአእማተ ፡ ወአግማለ
                  ፡ ወአእዱገ ።

translations.lxx: And the man became very rich, and he had many cattle, and oxen, and servants, and maid-servants, and camels, and asses.
translations.kjv: And the man increased exceedingly, and had much cattle, and maidservants, and menservants, and camels, and asses.
